title.en: Launch Ready: Containerized MVP from Scratch
title.es: Listo para lanzar: MVP Contenedorizado desde Cero

description.en: Set up a containerized MVP launchpad: Next.js frontend, FastAPI backend, and PostgreSQL orchestrated with Docker Compose — one command to run the full stack.
description.es: Configura la plataforma de lanzamiento de un MVP contenedorizado: frontend Next.js, backend FastAPI y PostgreSQL orquestados con Docker Compose — un solo comando para levantar el stack completo.

sharing.en: I just completed Launch Ready: Containerized MVP from Scratch with LearnPack @4GeeksAcademy. Check it out: https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/ai-engineering-syllabus/tree/main/content/projects/launch-ready-containerized-mvp #AIEngineering #LearnPack #4GeeksAcademy #architecture #backenddesign #fastapi
